name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum supplementing an agreement to cover the use of AI services, including input, output, and related restrictions.

fields.label: Defined In Agreement
fields.help: The name of the parent agreement this AI Addendum supplements (e.g. 'Cloud Service Agreement dated January 1, 2025').

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.help: The date this AI Addendum takes effect.

fields.label: Training Data
fields.help: Whether Provider is permitted to use Customer's Inputs or Outputs to train any Model. If 'No', Provider may not use Customer data for training.

fields.label: Training Purposes
fields.help: The specific purposes for which Provider may use Training Data to train Models. Only required if Training Data is 'Yes'.

fields.label: Training Restrictions
fields.help: Any restrictions on how Provider may use Training Data for training Models. Only applicable if Training Data is 'Yes'.

fields.label: Improvement Restrictions
fields.help: Restrictions on Provider's use of Input, Output, and Training Data for non-training improvement of the AI System (e.g. maintenance, development, quality improvement).
